reasoning.typography: This is a browser error page, not the actual site — default system font with zero typographic intention
reasoning.hierarchy: DNS error hierarchy is functional but completely generic Chrome error template
reasoning.distinctiveness: Literally a DNS failure page — zero brand expression, could be any broken site
reasoning.color: Default browser dark mode error colors — no palette decisions made
reasoning.density: Browser-default centered error layout with no design consideration
reasoning.voice: Technical error message with no IA to evaluate — 'DNS_PROBE_FINISHED_NXDOMAIN' is infrastructure failure, not content

anti_patterns: Site is completely unreachable — DNS not configured
No actual design exists to evaluate
Error page reveals no brand personality or strategic thinking
Suggests domain was purchased but never properly set up
